perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the creator standing in the freezer aisle of a Costco warehouse, reaching for and pulling out a red box of sesame nut sticky rice balls. She shows the packaging closely to the camera. (2) The scene transitions to a domestic indoor setting where two young women sit at a table. One woman holds a spoon with a cooked sticky rice ball, breaking it open to reveal the dark sesame filling. (3) They both interact with the camera, gesturing towards the product box and tasting the food with smiles and positive facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice narrates over the footage of the warehouse. (2) Sound of a refrigerator door opening is briefly heard. (3) As the scene shifts indoors, the BGM continues at a steady pace while two female voices engage in a lively conversation about the product's price and flavor quality. No significant ambient noise or distracting SFX are present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE", "Sesame Nut Sticky Rice Balls 13.4 yuan each", "Red Bean Dining Hall Sesame Nut Sticky Rice Balls 269 yuan". (2) Decorative/Effect Text: "Who wants to eat sticky rice balls?", "It looks delicious and the filling flows!", "The most expensive in history", "Full of sesame aroma!!", "It's very delicious".

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping Hook -> Product Introduction -> Home Tasting -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female creators are shown together in the second half of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women with long dark hair, one wearing a light blue/grey coat and the other wearing a black top and a beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco freezer aisles with various frozen goods; a cozy indoor living room with a couch and soft lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright retail fluorescent lighting and warm home ambient light.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend a premium brand of sesame sticky rice balls available at Costco. It justifies the relatively high price by highlighting the quality of the filling and the overall taste experience through visual demonstration and personal endorsement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly name the brand and store, show the product in detail, and give a strong verbal and visual recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of colorful, expressive Traditional Chinese text overlays and a focus on 'worth it' price calculations.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'Costco find' format popular on social media, utilizing high-energy presentation to drive engagement.
